## What happened
PetfoodIndustry reported that RCL Foods recalled pet food because of potential Salmonella contamination.

## Key facts
- **Source:** PetfoodIndustry (March 6, 2026)
- **Company:** RCL Foods
- **Affected animals:** Other pets
- **Pathogen:** Salmonella
- **Risk:** Salmonella can cause illness in pets and may be transmitted to people.

## What pet owners should do
- Halt use of the recalled pet food immediately.
- Verify lot numbers and product details on the official recall notice.
- Clean bowls, scoops, and storage areas thoroughly.
- Seek veterinary care if your pet shows signs of illness.
